# CONTENT SCRIPT - Multi Stone Collection (5 Stones)

> Date: 2026-04-05
> Mode: Multi (5 stones in 1 Facebook post)
> Collection Mix: ArtsCut Zero (Luxury/Luxury Plus) + Ultra Thin Natural Surface
> Stones: Atlantis PV1016, Dolomite PV6010, Magma Gold PV1015, Amazonite PV1017, Opal PV0806

## Input Product Links

- Atlantis PV1016: https://pvstone.com.au/catalog/artscut-zero/luxury-plus/atlantis-or-pv1016
- Dolomite PV6010: https://pvstone.com.au/catalog/artscut-zero/luxury/dolomite-or-pv6010
- Magma Gold PV1015: https://pvstone.com.au/catalog/artscut-zero/luxury-plus/magma-gold-or-pv1015
- Amazonite PV1017: https://pvstone.com.au/catalog/artscut-zero/luxury-plus/amazonite-or-pv1017
- Opal PV0806: https://pvstone.com.au/catalog/ultra-thin-surfaces/ultra-thin-natural-surface/opal-or-pv0806

## Web Research Results

Source used:

- VPStone catalog pages
- AC Stone official product pages (AC codes)

| Stone      | PV Code | AC Code | Colour / Pattern                                                    | Finish                                    | Measurements      | Feature / Notes                                |
| ---------- | ------- | ------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------- | ----------------------------------------- | ----------------- | ---------------------------------------------- |
| Atlantis   | PV1016  | AC1016  | Deep blue base, blue-orange veining, subtle brown undertones        | Matt                                      | 1620x3220x20mm    | Backlit, translucent look                      |
| Dolomite   | PV6010  | AC6010  | Crisp white-grey palette with delicate grey veining                 | Matt                                      | 1620x3220x20mm    | Book Match, N+ vein technology                 |
| Magma Gold | PV1015  | AC1015  | Deep black base with rich gold and rust volcanic waves              | Leather (also marketed with gloss option) | 1620x3220x20mm    | Bold statement, Book Match                     |
| Amazonite  | PV1017  | AC1017  | Seafoam green and cool steely tones with mahogany and golden flecks | Matt                                      | 1620x3220x20mm    | Backlit, translucent character                 |
| Opal       | PV0806  | AC0806  | Clean grey base with soft white striations, lightly textured        | Textured                                  | 1220x3050x1.5-3mm | Ultra-thin natural surface for walls/furniture |

## Image Generation Prompts (Google Flow)

Google Flow URL: https://labs.google/fx/tools/flow

Quick steps for each image:

1. Open Google Flow and sign in.
2. Click Add Reference and upload the matching slab image from docs/image_temp.
3. Set aspect ratio (3:4 for hero, 1:1 for close-up).
4. Paste prompt.
5. Generate and download.

### Image 1 - Atlantis Hero (Laundry, 3:4)

Individual caption: Atlantis PV1016 transforms this Melbourne laundry into a bold designer space. #StoneBenchtops #Melbourne

Attach reference image before generating: docs/image_temp/2026-04-05-pv1016-reference.jpg

```text
Create ONE SINGLE photorealistic interior photo (not a collage, not split-screen, not side-by-side).

Use the uploaded stone sample as the exact benchtop material.
Use the attached reference stone image as the primary visual source.
The stone is Atlantis PV1016: deep ocean blue engineered stone with blue-orange veining and subtle brown undertones, matt finish, 20mm thickness, backlit capable.
Keep the colour, veining and finish identical to the reference stone.

Show a modern Australian laundry in a Melbourne home, with this stone installed on the laundry benchtop.
White cabinetry, undermount sink, brushed metal tap, folded towels, woven basket and small indoor plant.
Natural daylight from a side window, realistic lived-in styling.

Photorealistic, real project photo, Australian home, Melbourne, natural daylight, not CGI.
3:4 vertical composition, one single finished scene only.
No AI artifacts, no plastic look.
```

### Image 2 - Atlantis Close-up (1:1)

Individual caption: A closer look at Atlantis PV1016 reveals striking ocean-depth veining. #StoneDetails #InteriorDesign

```text
Create ONE photorealistic close-up of an Atlantis PV1016 benchtop edge.
Use the attached reference stone image as the primary visual source.
The stone is deep ocean blue with blue-orange veining and subtle brown undertones.

Show pencil round edge profile, 20mm thickness, with natural daylight highlighting the veining and finish.
Styled with a ceramic cup, folded linen cloth and timber tray.

Macro photography, shallow depth of field, warm natural light, editorial quality.
1:1 square composition. No AI artifacts, no plastic look, not CGI.
```

## Video Generation Prompt (1 combined video)

### Video 1 - Multi-stone Collection Pan (Meta AI, 8 seconds)

Video caption: Five premium surfaces, one Melbourne collection designed for standout homes. #VPStoneMason #PremiumStone

```text
A smooth cinematic 8-second camera sequence across five modern Melbourne home spaces featuring premium stone installations: Atlantis PV1016 laundry benchtop, Dolomite PV6010 outdoor BBQ kitchen, Magma Gold PV1015 fireplace surround, Amazonite PV1017 kitchen island, and Opal PV0806 kitchen splashback wall panels. Slow stable camera movement, subtle depth of field, warm natural daylight. Photorealistic, real project footage style, Australian home, no CGI, no sudden cuts. Base all stone colour and veining continuity on the attached reference images.
```

## Facebook Captions

### Main Post Caption (English)

```text
New Premium Surface Collection - 5 Signature Looks for Melbourne Homes

Discover five standout surfaces now available at PVStoneau, selected for modern Australian interiors and practical luxury.

- Atlantis PV1016: Deep ocean-blue tones with expressive movement
- Dolomite PV6010: Refined white-grey palette for timeless elegance
- Magma Gold PV1015: Bold black base with flowing gold-rust drama
- Amazonite PV1017: Seafoam beauty with rich natural flecks
- Opal PV0806: Ultra-thin textured grey surface for feature walls and splashbacks

Key Highlights:
- CSF compliant engineered stone options in ArtsCut Zero range
- Premium finishes for kitchens, laundries, fireplaces and outdoor entertaining
- Ultra-thin natural surface option for wall applications and furniture paneling

DM us or call 0450 938 079 for a FREE quote.

#VPStoneMason #StoneBenchtops #Melbourne #KitchenDesign #BathroomDesign #EngineeredStone #AustralianHomes #HomeRenovation #MelbourneHomes #PremiumStone #CSFStone #InteriorDesign #AtlantisStone #DolomiteStone #MagmaGold #AmazoniteStone #OpalSurface

- - - - -
PVStoneau - Premium Stone Benchtops Melbourne
Showroom: 32 Spalding Ave Sunshine North VIC
Phone: 0450 938 079
Email: info@pvstone.com.au
Website: https://pvstone.com.au/
Opening Hours:
Mon-Fri: 9:00 AM - 5:00 PM
Sat: 10:00 AM - 2:00 PM
```

- Opal hero: Opal PV0806 adds soft texture and modern calm to this Melbourne kitchen wall design.

| Step  | Task                          | Tool        | Time      |
| ----- | ----------------------------- | ----------- | --------- |
